Name: LOGIC_COM_PARAM
Description: Defines core AI behavior settings including perception, pursuit, combat behavior, environmental interaction, and tactical decision-making logic used by enemies and NPCs.

Fields.Name: Logic ID
Fields.Description: Unique identifier for this AI logic configuration.

Fields.Name: Maximum Vision Distance
Fields.Description: Maximum distance at which the AI can visually detect targets.

Fields.Name: Minimum Vision Distance
Fields.Description: Minimum guaranteed visual detection range.

Fields.Name: Rear Vision Distance
Fields.Description: Distance at which the AI can detect targets behind itself.

Fields.Name: Horizontal Vision Angle
Fields.Description: Left and right field-of-view angle for visual target detection.

Fields.Name: Vertical Vision Angle
Fields.Description: Upward and downward field-of-view angle for visual target detection.

Fields.Name: Darkness Modifier
Fields.Description: Multiplier affecting visibility or detection performance in dark environments.

Fields.Name: Chase Distance
Fields.Description: Maximum distance the AI will pursue a target.

Fields.Name: Hearing Range Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier affecting the distance at which sounds can be detected.

Fields.Name: Hearing Sensitivity
Fields.Description: Controls how sensitive the AI is to sound-based events.

Fields.Name: Obstacle Detection Time
Fields.Description: Time interval used for obstacle detection and path obstruction evaluation.

Fields.Name: Obstacle Detection Speed
Fields.Description: Rate or responsiveness of obstacle detection processing.

Fields.Name: Squad Weight
Fields.Description: Relative weighting value used within coordinated squad AI behavior.

Fields.Name: Squad Priority
Fields.Description: Priority level assigned to this AI within squad coordination.

Fields.Name: Brightness Visibility Behavior
Fields.Description: Defines how lighting conditions affect visual detection.

Fields.Name: Can Use Doors
Fields.Description: Determines whether the AI can interact with and open doors.

Fields.Name: Can Use Ladders
Fields.Description: Determines whether the AI can climb ladders.

Fields.Name: Can Use Ropes
Fields.Description: Determines whether the AI can interact with rope traversal systems.

Fields.Name: Upper Logic Concurrent Instances
Fields.Description: Maximum number of simultaneously active upper-level AI logic routines.

Fields.Name: Post-Damage Priority Action
Fields.Description: Specifies the AI's preferred behavior after taking damage.

Fields.Name: NG+ Level 2 Threshold
Fields.Description: New Game Plus cycle count required for AI difficulty level 2.

Fields.Name: NG+ Level 3 Threshold
Fields.Description: New Game Plus cycle count required for AI difficulty level 3.

Fields.Name: NG+ Level 4 Threshold
Fields.Description: New Game Plus cycle count required for AI difficulty level 4.

Fields.Name: NG+ Level 5 Threshold
Fields.Description: New Game Plus cycle count required for AI difficulty level 5.

Fields.Name: Attack Distance Check Precision
Fields.Description: Defines the accuracy or method used for attack range evaluation.

Fields.Name: Item Pursuit Table
Fields.Description: Reference table used for AI pursuit behavior triggered by items.

Fields.Name: Item Pursuit Action
Fields.Description: Action performed when pursuing an item-related target.

Fields.Name: Guard Break Pursuit Table
Fields.Description: Reference table used after successfully breaking a target's guard.

Fields.Name: Guard Break Pursuit Action
Fields.Description: Action executed after a guard break occurs.

Fields.Name: Back Attack Table
Fields.Description: Reference table used for backstab or rear attack behavior.

Fields.Name: Back Attack Action
Fields.Description: Action performed during a successful rear attack opportunity.

Fields.Name: Item Pursuit Distance
Fields.Description: Maximum distance for item-related pursuit behavior.

Fields.Name: Guard Break Pursuit Distance
Fields.Description: Maximum pursuit distance after breaking an enemy's guard.

Fields.Name: Back Attack Distance
Fields.Description: Distance threshold for executing rear attack behaviors.

Fields.Name: Line-of-Sight Forget Time
Fields.Description: Time before the AI loses awareness of a target hidden behind obstacles.

Fields.Name: Return Retreat Distance
Fields.Description: Distance the AI retreats when returning to its original area.

Fields.Name: Return Retreat Time
Fields.Description: Duration of retreat movement when returning to origin.

Fields.Name: Healing Probability Table
Fields.Description: Reference table controlling AI healing behavior probabilities.

Fields.Name: Healing Action
Fields.Description: Action performed when the AI decides to heal.

Fields.Name: Healing HP Percentage Threshold
Fields.Description: Remaining HP percentage below which the AI attempts healing.

Fields.Name: Available Dodge Action Type
Fields.Description: Defines which evasive maneuvers the AI is allowed to use.

Fields.Name: Automatic Brake Strength
Fields.Description: Controls automatic movement braking intensity.

Fields.Name: Sound Check During Return
Fields.Description: Determines whether sound detection remains active while returning to origin.

Fields.Name: Target Elevated Positions
Fields.Description: Allows the AI to target lock-on points even if melee attacks cannot currently reach them.

Fields.Name: Alluring Skull Type
Fields.Description: Defines AI reaction behavior to alluring skull-type lure items.

Fields.Name: Yearning Spell Type
Fields.Description: Defines AI reaction behavior to Yearn or similar distraction spells.

Fields.Name: Request AI Authority at Long Range
Fields.Description: Determines whether the AI can request active processing authority even at long distances.
